title: Add live voting to commons-vote page

log.context: Add live voting to commons-vote page

Both pushes successful. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Backend (`/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`)**

Added `restHandleVote()` plus supporting helpers:
- `getVotesDb()` — opens `votes.db` at `/mnt/data/clunger/votes.db`, creates the `votes` table and unique index on first call
- `POST /api/vote` — upserts a vote (one per voter per poll), returns `{ ok, counts, winner }`. Fires Discord inject notification when winner threshold (3 votes) is reached.
